last_action: Fixed SQLAlchemy NameError, refined Move-out settlement calculation, added Admin Move-out History with full financial details.
summary: Phase 12: Admin Dashboard & Financial Clarity. Resolved a NameError bug in the settlement preview function. Updated the security deposit logic to aggregate all move-in fees from the lease contract for more accurate settlement calculations. Implemented a comprehensive Move-out History feature in the Admin Dashboard, allowing owners to view past tenants' stay details, resident lists, and full financial breakdowns (deductions, utility units, and refund receipts). Refined UI by removing redundant buttons on the tenant success pages.
next_steps: Test the Move-out History with real-world complex billing scenarios.
Implement an export feature for the Move-out History data (CSV/PDF).
Gather feedback on the new initial fee summation logic for settlements.
